name: Basic Technical QA
description: Provider-agnostic technical checks for generated image files. This preset is safe as the gateway default.

checks.description: Output path exists and is readable.
Image bytes can be decoded and format can be detected.
Actual width and height are detected and recorded.
Actual image aspect ratio approximately matches the requested size ratio. Exact pixel dimensions are not required.

agent_guidance.on_warning: Deliver the image and mention technical risk if relevant.
agent_guidance.on_severe_warning: Deliver only if usable, and suggest user-confirmed regeneration.
must_not: Do not automatically retry solely because this QA preset reports a warning.
Do not resize, crop, or convert generated images as part of QA.
